# fly_mpg_clusters (Data Source)

Lists Fly.io Managed Postgres (MPG) clusters.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fly_mpg_clusters" "all" {}

output "cluster_names" {
  value = [for c in data.fly_mpg_clusters.all.clusters : c.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `clusters` (Attributes List) The list of MPG clusters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--clusters))

<a id="nestedatt--clusters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `clusters`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Cluster ID.
- `name` (String) Cluster name.
- `region` (String) Cluster region.
- `status` (String) Cluster status.
